summary: Iteration 6 end-to-end test of the 9 new features (OTP/guest checkout/broadcast/templates/auto-bestseller/admin alerts/sample-csv/corporate kits/dynamic hero/add-color). Backend: 19/19 pytest assertions PASSED (test_iter6_features.py) — OTP send+verify, guest checkout with order+user+generated_password creation, sample CSV download with attachment header, /corporate/kits returning 3 kits + customizable flag, /admin/broadcast counts, /admin/alerts, /admin/run-auto-bestseller, /admin/notifications-log persistence, /settings template save+persist. Frontend: Dynamic hero shows Zip-Up Hoodie (real seeded bestseller) ✓. Guest add-to-cart works without login redirect ✓. Full 3-step guest checkout completed (details → OTP via Dev OTP hint → COD pay) and produced 'Order placed!' toast ✓. Corporate page shows kits-gallery with 3 kit-cards + kit-card-custom, premium select adds SELECTED badge, rfq-selected-kit reflects choice, 'Login required' text present ✓. Admin Notifications tab fully wired (notifications-log-card, template-order_placed_email + tpl-*-body, save-templates-btn, broadcast subject/body/channels, send-broadcast-btn) ✓. admin-alerts-strip shows 'bestseller(s) marked as Few units left' alerts with Dismiss button ✓. Customers tab has Verified column (email/phone badges) + Type column (GUEST/REGISTERED) + 14 verify-sms/verify-email buttons ✓. add-color-btn exists on ProductForm ✓. CRITICAL BUG: Products tab is MISSING the download-sample-csv-btn and run-auto-bestseller-btn — the JS handlers `downloadSampleCSV` and `runAutoBestseller` are defined in Admin.jsx (lines 121-132) but never bound to any rendered button. Backend endpoints work; only the UI buttons are missing.

ui_bugs.issue: download-sample-csv-btn is missing — handler downloadSampleCSV() defined at Admin.jsx:129 but no button renders it
run-auto-bestseller-btn is missing — handler runAutoBestseller() defined at Admin.jsx:121 but no button renders it

issues: Alert message appears duplicated in strip text (same 'X bestseller(s) marked as Few units left' line shown twice). Worth checking the alerts list for duplicate entries from repeated /admin/run-auto-bestseller calls.
React warning: empty string passed to src on some product/category cards. Non-blocking.

action_items: Add the missing <button data-testid="download-sample-csv-btn" onClick={downloadSampleCSV}> and <button data-testid="run-auto-bestseller-btn" onClick={runAutoBestseller}> inside the Products tab toolbar in Admin.jsx (near csv-upload-btn at line ~279).
Consider de-duplicating admin alerts so re-running auto-bestseller does not create repeat entries with identical messages.
Optionally: guard to silence the React empty-src warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin.jsx defines runAutoBestseller and downloadSampleCSV functions but never invokes them from any onClick — dead code paths leading to a missing-feature bug.
/api/checkout/guest correctly creates a user with phone_verified=true, generates a temp password, and logs guest_welcome_email — clean implementation.
/api/admin/broadcast respects marketing_opt_in for registered users and email_verified for email channel, phone_verified for sms — sensible defaults.
OTP endpoint returning dev_code in the response is intentional for dev mode but MUST be removed/guarded behind ENV flag before production deploy.
Admin.jsx is 685 lines — recommend splitting per tab (Products/Customers/Notifications/Settings) into separate components for maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% — 2 missing UI buttons on Admin Products tab

test_credentials: admin@merchcraft.in / Admin@123 • demo@merchcraft.in / Demo@123 • superadmin@merchcraft.in / Super@123
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_-prefixed guest orders + users during checkout flow tests (visible in Customers tab: frontend_test@, test_guest_*, test_log_*, johnguest@). Templates were briefly modified with a TEST_MARKER and then restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 new backend features work via API. Only frontend gap is two missing buttons on the Admin → Products tab (downloadSampleCSV + runAutoBestseller handlers exist but no <button> elements). After main agent wires them up, re-run the Products tab portion only. Logged-in customer skip-OTP flow was NOT browser-tested (out of time budget) but the backend logic _has_verified_phone() exists and is exercised by the regular /checkout endpoint.
rca_of_the_issue: Admin.jsx contains complete handler logic (lines 121-132) for both Auto-Bestseller and Sample CSV but the Products tab JSX (around line 270-290) only renders csv-upload-btn (bulk import) and never adds the corresponding <GhostBtn data-testid='download-sample-csv-btn' onClick={downloadSampleCSV}> and <GhostBtn data-testid='run-auto-bestseller-btn' onClick={runAutoBestseller}>. Fix is a 2-line JSX addition.
